product.name: CalmKids Protein Granola Minis
product.category: Grocery & Gourmet Food > Kids' Snacks > Protein Granola Bites
product.description: Soft, toddler-friendly granola minis offering gentle morning energy. Bite-sized oat and hemp protein granola clusters lightly sweetened with fruit puree. The soft texture is safe for toddlers learning to chew, and the gentle protein supports morning energy without overstimulation. Perfect for breakfast, snacks, or outings.
features: Found in the toddler snacks section

competitors.name: Kind
competitors.key_feature: Simple whole ingredients you can see and pronounce, gluten-free with nuts and dark chocolate

competitors.name: Clif
competitors.key_feature: Plant-based energy bar with sustained energy from organic rolled oats

competitors.name: Made Good Granola Bites
competitors.key_feature: Allergy-friendly, school-safe granola bites with hidden vegetable nutrients for kids
